title: Logical error: 'Written 1 elements of column c0, but 0 rows of PK columns'
description:
### Describe the bug
Not so easy to reproduce. Related to vertical merges?
### How to reproduce
My [users.xml](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22945774/users.xml)
On a debug build run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree() PRIMARY KEY tuple() SETTINGS min_bytes_for_wide_part = 0, vertical_merge_algorithm_min_bytes_to_activate = 1, vertical_merge_algorithm_min_rows_to_activate = 0, index_granularity = 1, vertical_merge_algorithm_min_columns_to_activate = 1;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES ('do'), ('你们'), ('日本'), (')'), ('day'), ('try'), (NULL), ('爸爸'), ('哪国人'), (x'E28228FF'), ('😉'), ('{'), (';'), ('漂亮'), ('照片'), ('\0'), ('move'), ('think'), ('日本'), ('is'), ('c\nc'), ('{}'), ('美国'), (NULL), ('照片'), (NULL), ('look'), ('thing'), (NULL), ('😉'), ('keep'), (NULL), ('back'), ('show'), ('😉'), ('{}'), ('照片'), ('cut'), ('名字'), ('兄弟姐妹'), ('美国'), ('1'), (NULL), ('叫'), ('😉'), ('/'), ('b\tb'), ('爸爸'), (','), ('ask'), (NULL), ('man'), ('want'), ('0'), (NULL), ('look'), ('walk'), (''), ('will'), ('哪国人'), ('watch'), (NULL), ('had'), ('漂亮'), (NULL), (NULL), ('seem'), ('find'), (NULL), ('sentence'), (')'), ('{'), ('照片'), ('\\'), ('认识你很高兴'), (x'A0A1'), ('say'), ('ask'), ('认识你很高兴'), ('null'), ('back'), (NULL), ('你们'), ('has'), (x'E28228FF'), ('照片'), ('漂亮'), ('[]'), ('should'), ('went'), ('日本'), ('know'), ('play'), ('open'), ('你们'), ('-1'), ('日本'), ('认识你很高兴'), ('FALSE'), ('name'), ('名字'), ('()'), (';'), ('你们'), ('think'), ('study'), ('thought'), ('follow'), ('study'), (''), ('-1'), ('叫'), ('\''), ('叫'), (''), (NULL), ('漂亮'), ('had'), (NULL), ('water'), ('does}日本照片日本]make认识你很高兴'), ('let'), ('你们'), ('say'), ('should'), ('你们'), ('_'), (x'AAC328'), ('😉'), ('--'), ('close'), ('have'), ('日本'), ('place'), ('美国'), ('哪国人'), ('哪国人'), ('thing'), ('叫'), ('show'), ('{}'), ('认识你很高兴'), ('()'), ('\n'), ('need'), ('漂亮'), ('漂亮'), ('use'), ('你们'), ('\n'), ('漂亮'), ('see'), ('兄弟姐妹'), ('read'), (NULL), ('美国'), ('日本'), ('NULL'), ('might'), ('grow'), ('took'), ('兄弟姐妹'), ('get'), ('be'), (x'F0288C28'), ('你们'), ('can'), ('has'), (':'), ('did'), ('got'), ('日本'), ('carry'), ('may'), ('grow'), ('said'), ('hear'), ('😉'), (x'C328'), (NULL), ('哪国人'), ('爸爸'), ('哪国人');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 String', 11534244747785854120, 6119, 2) LIMIT 679;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT 'need' FROM numbers(522);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 String', 17010632438609867543, 501, 10) LIMIT 972;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT '.' FROM numbers(878);
```
It may take a few tries, not sure if race condition.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Written 1 elements of column c0, but 0 rows of PK columns'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

5. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1373: DB::MergeTask::VerticalMergeStage::finalizeVerticalMergeForOneColumn() const @ 0x000000001dc481d9
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR, c3 FLOAT) INDEX BY c1;
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL), (2, 'data', 3.14), (3, 'example', NULL), (4, 'NULL', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT * FROM t1;
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3) SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3) SELECT c1 + 1, CONCAT('new_', c2), c3 FROM t1 WHERE c1 < 3;
key_bug_features: Vertical merges with ReplacingMergeTree primary key issue
